sections.paragraph:
σκολιότης, ητος, ἡ (σκολιός; Hippocr.+; LXX, Aq., Sym.) fig. (Aristaen., Ep. 1, 28) crookedness, perversity, deceit (Ezk 16:5 τῇ σκολ. τῆς ψυχῆς σου) w. πονηρία Hv 3, 9, 1.—DELG s.v. σκέλος.

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Aq Aq , II a.d.—List 5

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

Aristaen Aristaen , epistologr., V a.d.—List 5

Ep.

Ep. = Epistola/Epistula, when applied to letters mostly pseudonymous; various dates—List 5

  1. = epistle

Hv Hv = Visions

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 930
